title: AN AFTERNOON
subtitle: The Apartment · 1:14 PM · Two Months Later
epigraph_upright: Two months later. Reed is back for an afternoon — no boxes this time. Just an afternoon. Frasier is coming over from the diner. The old friend is downstairs in the diner already.
epigraph_reversed: Two months wasn't enough. The conversation is the same conversation. The afternoon ends the same way the last one did.
scene_description: Two months on. Reed at the bed corner (not the boxes — there are no more boxes). SYNC at 1 (the friendship has held), doubt at 1. Frasier is coming over. The friend is in the diner about to come up.
direction_hint: SYNC to 5. 4 connections. Leap with Reed at the same threshold.
opening_log_lines: reed is at the bed corner. they brought a coffee from the diner.
the painting on the easel is still two-thirds done.
frasier is in the diner. he sent word he's coming up.

stagnation_thresholds.label: somebody hasn't said a thing in a while.
the friend's visit is becoming awkward.

doubt_thresholds.label: they wonder if two months was enough.

notes: Medium-mode Lovers. Two months later. SYNC starts at 1; harder visitor mix (Frasier preoccupied, the friend talkative but awkward). 4 connections + 2 hard moods + sync 5 + paired leap.
ambient_pool: the diner is busier on a saturday afternoon.
the radiator is louder than two months ago.
